---
title: create-officina
description: 'create-officina scaffolds an SDK-consuming starter.'
---

`create-officina` scaffolds an SDK-consuming starter.

```bash
npx create-officina my-admin
```

The generated app includes:

- `@officina/ui`
- `@officina/core`
- `@officina/features`
- `@officina/mocks`
- local provider setup
- selected vertical data
- `.env.example`

The release pipeline validates both sides of the scaffold:

- `pnpm verify:create-app` runs the CLI into a temporary generated app and
  checks token replacement, selected vertical pruning, SDK imports, and private
  alias boundaries.
- `pnpm pack:create-app` packs the CLI and checks the tarball includes the bin,
  template, manifest, README, and public publish metadata.

Use the full source template when a buyer wants complete ownership of every
feature file. Use the SDK starter when a buyer wants package updates.
